s-1.ptxt: INSPECT AND ADJUST BRAKE BOOSTER PUSH ROD (for TMMK Made)

item.ptxt: Make an adjustment with no vacuum in the brake booster assembly. (Depress the brake pedal several times with the engine stopped.)
The brake booster made by TMC does not need adjustment.
Adjustment of the brake booster push rod is required when the brake master cylinder sub-assembly is replaced with a new one.
Adjustment is not necessary when the removed brake master cylinder sub-assembly is reused and the brake booster assembly is replaced with a new one.

s2.ptxt: Apply chalk to the tip of the accessory tool.

atten4.ptxt: An accessory tool is enclosed with a new brake master cylinder sub-assembly.

s2.ptxt: Place the accessory tool on the brake booster assembly.
Measure the clearance between the brake booster push rod and accessory tool.

atten4.ptxt: Adjust the clearance in the following cases:

item.ptxt: If there is a clearance between the accessory tool and the shell of the brake booster (floating accessory tool), the push rod is protruding too far.
If the chalk does not stick on the tip of the brake booster push rod, the push rod protrusion is insufficient.

s2.ptxt: If the clearance is not as specified, adjust the push rod length by holding the rod using SST and turning the tip of the rod using a socket driver (7 mm, 0.28 in.).

atten4.ptxt: Check the push rod clearance again after adjustment.
